name: Analisis de fev_layout.prg con indice Markdown
description: Lee fev_layout.prg, extrae funciones y descripciones, genera indice Markdown y lo guarda en docs/fev_layout_index.md

tasks.prompt: Read fev_layout.prg completely. Extract all Harbour functions (Static Function / FUNCTION) found in the file. For each function, capture: function name, exact starting line number, and the one-line description from the comment header above each function. Also extract the additional functions listed below the main header: CreateConsoleAppTabs, ShowFolderTabsConfig, ToggleRightFldex, SaveFolderConfig. Include also the C/C++ functions in the #pragma BEGINDUMP sections: XD_PROCOPENNOWIN, XD_PROCCLOSE, XD_PROCKILL, XD_KILLTREE, XDMAKECIRCLEBMP, PTY_InitApi, PTY_Reader. Return a structured text list with one function per line: FUNCTION_NAME | LINE | DESCRIPTION

Read fev_layout.prg completely. Identify every function definition (Static Function, FUNCTION, and C functions HB_FUNC) with their exact line numbers. For each function, note whether it is Harbour (Static Function/FUNCTION) or C (HB_FUNC/#pragma). Also note any important static variable dependencies used by each function (e.g. oTabs, oSideBarL, oSplitterR, etc.). Return the result as a structured list: FUNCTION_NAME | LINE | TYPE | KEY_STATICS_USED

Use the results from previous tasks. Task {{task.1-1.result}} contains the function names with line numbers and descriptions. Task {{task.2-1.result}} contains additional detail on function types and static variable dependencies. Combine both into a single Markdown index file. Format: start with a title '# fev_layout.prg — Function Index', then a summary table with columns: Function, Line, Type, Description. Group Harbour functions first (alphabetically), then C functions. After the table, add a 'Details' section with one subsection per function listing: line, type, description, and static dependencies. Save the file as docs/fev_layout_index.md. Ensure the docs/ directory exists before writing.
